Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kristina L. Hillman, Esq. of WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD 510/839-6600, for petitioner CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD, moving to confirm arbiration award

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award -- Granted -- no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
